title: Figure 26 from: Wiklund H, Taylor JD, Dahlgren TG, Todt C, Ikebe C, Rabone M, Glover AG (2017) Abyssal fauna of the UK-1 polymetallic nodule exploration area, Clarion-Clipperton Zone, central Pacific Ocean: Mollusca. ZooKeys 707: 1-46. https://doi.org/10.3897/zookeys.707.13042
author: Wiklund, Helena

description:
Figure 26 - 
                    
                      Lophomeniinae sp. (NHM_027) A Dorsal view of preserved specimen B Preserved specimen (ventro-lateral view) following DNA extraction. Scale bar: 0.5 mm. Image attribution Glover, Dahlgren & Wiklund, 2017.
